mapper.sql: p.id, p.school_id, p.program_name, p.college_name, p.degree_type, p.subject_category_code, p.subject_category_name, p.direction_code, p.direction_name, p.study_mode, p.duration_months, p.tuition_amount, p.tuition_currency, p.language_type, p.language_min_score, p.gpa_min_recommend, p.requires_gre, p.requires_gmat, p.background_preference, p.application_rounds_overview, p.suitable_tags, p.intake_term, p.program_summary, s.school_name_cn, s.school_name_en, s.country_code, s.country_name, s.qs_rank
mapper.select: SELECT FROM program p INNER JOIN school s ON s.id = p.school_id WHERE p.id = #{programId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, subject_category_code, direction_code, direction_name FROM major_direction ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
